rationale: ADDRESSED. The round-2 spec adds real AC pins, not just restatements. AC7 requires an internal/panel decision test for 6 APPROVE + 2 refuted REQUEST_CHANGES at expected_reviewers 8 / threshold 7, still Blocking on the approval floor with sub-threshold messaging. AC8 requires an internal/panel decision test for 5 APPROVE + 1 unrecognized verdict Blocking, and the same slot remaining Blocked when targeted by a refutation. AC9 separately asserts refuted RCs do not increment Result.Approves, closing the threshold-gaming loophole. AC10 pins the no-advertise block-message predicate with concrete forbidden substrings and go test proofs. These ACs are executable implementation contracts with runnable selectors and appear again in Validation Proofs.

findings.issue: Round 1 requested AC coverage proving sub-threshold-after-refutation still blocks.
findings.evidence: AC7 now pins 6 APPROVE + 2 refuted REQUEST_CHANGES, expected_reviewers 8 / threshold 7, with Block on approval floor and runnable `go test ./internal/panel -run 'Refut|PanelGateDecision'` proof.

findings.issue: Round 1 requested AC coverage proving unrecognized latest-round verdicts block and are non-refutable.
findings.evidence: AC8 now pins 5 APPROVE + 1 unrecognized/non-standard verdict -> Block, plus a refutation targeting that slot still -> Block, with runnable internal/panel proof.
